mapper.insert:
SELECT BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_QNA VALUES ( #{boardNum}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContents}, #{boardWriter}, sysdate, 0,
#{boardRef},
#{boardNum},
#{boardStep}, #{boardDepth} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_QNA SET BOARD_STEP=BOARD_STEP+1 WHERE BOARD_REF=#{boardRef} AND BOARD_STEP>#{boardStep}
